reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar para hacer una parada y pasar un rato. Con un buen campo alrededor. Cuenta con fogones y mesitas. No se puede acampar. Los baños espectaculares como son característicos del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
A lovely spot to stop and relax. It's surrounded by beautiful countryside and has fire pits and picnic tables. Camping is not allowed. The restrooms are fantastic, as is typical of the ACA.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyalplRXFBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los playeros buena atención.  La estación muy dejada y el lugar de recreación de al lado bastante mal cuidado  siendo que nuestro amigo es socio no pudimos usarlo x que según el encargado éramos muchos (15) tuvimos que irnos

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants were helpful. The station was very run down, and the recreation area next door was quite poorly maintained. Even though our friend is a member, we couldn't use it because, according to the manager, there were too many of us (15), so we had to leave.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyamRLSUlREAE
